title: The Kozuki Retainers Reveal the Truth
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Kinemon, Toki, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as The truth of the Kozuki retainers and Wano’s time-displaced rebellion is revealed as Kaido’s power closes in.
scene: Kinemon explains the Kozuki tragedy, the twenty-year leap, and the mission to overthrow Kaido and Orochi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Where is my mother?!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Tell me, Kinemon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Worn out graves....!!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: So the tales of lady Toki's powers...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: were all true...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've landed in the Uano Country...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: 20 years after that incident!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...we were truly in an unknown world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We travelled around the Wano Country in order to better understand its current state.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There were factories lined up, row by row... countless smoke- streams rising into the air...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: undrink- able water... and rations controlled by those in power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Daimyo and Village Gone, and the VAST WASTE- LAND...!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Kozuki name was scorned...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...We realized that this was no longer the Wano country we once knew.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We thought we would be unable to find people to fight alongside us, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: We were wrong.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are Lord Kozuki MOMONO- Suke, is that correct?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I am JIBU' Emon of the Kibi, a former retainer of the Shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 20 years... I have been waiting here for 20 years.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I believed Lady Toki's words... and waited here for this day!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My mother...!?

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: Lady Toki's last words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: indicated that the Kozuki family would rise again in 20 years....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had my doubts, and as to give proof to such words...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I searched for the remains of the nine red scabbards. I was unable to find them.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if there was a one in a million chance....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We had hope that you would appear 20 years from that day....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you are willing to lead the fight against Orochi....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...then we will stand by your side and fight when the time comes!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No matter where we are, or what we are doing...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We all have tattoos of the mark of the moon on our ankles, and shall wait for your command....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Unbelievable... even though 20 years have passed, we still have allies we can count on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We must gather together in secret. Nobody can know of what we are planning.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We shall do our utmost!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We entrusted Kiku with gathering intel on the enemies....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And us four, as you already know, set out to recruit allies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: leaving the country is also a crime. As we were leaving, they spotted us,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: and began to pursue us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because none of us had any navigational skills, on our way to Zou,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We immediately shipwrecked and lost our vessel.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: There, we parted with Raiza.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let us meet on you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Barely escaping with our lives, we ended up drifting to dressrose. There, we were chased by Doflamingo,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who was working with kaidou...! In the process of trying to catch up to Lord momonosuke, who had accidentally boarded a mysterious ship...

dialogue.speaker: Kanjuro
dialogue.text: We parted with Kanjuro there.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not worry about me. Save your- selves!!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country - Kozuki Secret storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The Kozuki retainers reveal that Wano’s rebellion has been carried twenty years into the future.
